---
title: "portfolio_website"
---
---
title: "David T. Watkeys"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope #bootstrap icons is dope install.packages("bsicons") 
                      #library(bsicons)
                      #bs_icon_names()
                      #bsicons::bs_icon("mortarboard") see them 
      text: Email
      href: mailto:davwat22@vt.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/david-watkeys-0a3b85335/ 
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/davwat22-glitch
---

## Welcome

David T. Watkeys is a Masters student in the Department of History at Virginia Tech.
This site serves as a digital log of research, projects, and academic
work completed during my time at VT.

## Research Interests

My work centers on Indigenous histories of what is now the United States,
the history of the War on Drugs, the cultural and historical value of
entheogenic plants, and histories of resistance. I also boast award-winning
research in Indigenous, legal and environmental history under the tutelage of Eddie Polanco and Ed Gitre.

This website was made with extensive assistance from Dr. Jessie Sadler and Madison Smith. I am eternally grateful to all of you.
